summary: Completed testing of round-robin lead assignment fix. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Marketing Board, Sales CRM, and Pre-Sales CRM all loading correctly with team stats and lead assignments.
seed_data_creation: Created test leads with prefix TEST_RR_ for round-robin assignment testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Round-robin lead assignment fix verified. Key tests: 1) POST /api/crm/leads with stage_type=sales creates lead with assigned_to populated, 2) PATCH /api/crm/leads/{id}/stage to stg_appointment transfers lead to sales with assigned_to populated, 3) POST /api/crm/fix-unassigned-sales-leads migration endpoint works, 4) GET /api/marketing/dashboard returns pre_sales_team and sales_team with stats, 5) Marketing Board UI shows team members and Recent Lead Activity with assigned names.

backend: test_03_get_distribution_settings - GET /api/marketing/distribution-settings returns valid team data
test_09_verify_recent_lead_activity_has_assigned_name - Recent Lead Activity shows assigned names
test_distribution_settings_has_valid_users - Distribution settings team members are valid
frontend: Marketing Board loads with Pre-Sales Team and Sales Team stats
Marketing Board shows Lead Distribution Engine toggle (Enabled)
Marketing Board shows team member details (Kavitha Nair, Karthik Reddy, Ravi Sales, Divya Pillai)
Recent Lead Activity shows assigned_to_name for test leads
Sales CRM loads with lead cards showing 'From Pre-Sales' badges
Pre-Sales CRM loads with lead cards and stage columns

verified_fixes: Round-robin assignment now validates team members before assigning
Sales leads created via POST /api/crm/leads with stage_type=sales get assigned_to populated
Pre-Sales → Sales transfer (stg_appointment) assigns transferred lead to sales team member
Marketing dashboard auto-refreshes distribution settings on load
Migration endpoint POST /api/crm/fix-unassigned-sales-leads fixes existing unassigned leads
